name: 15q11_q13_Prader_Willi_Angelman
description: 15q11-q13 Prader-Willi / Angelman syndrome critical region. Three BP clusters (BP1, BP2, BP3) of segmental duplications, each containing HERC2/GOLGA8/NIPA paralogs, mediate recurrent NAHR-driven deletions (BP1-BP3 or BP2-BP3 type I/II) and duplications (Dup15q syndrome). Imprinted SNRPN/UBE3A interval is the unique core.

architecture.internal_structure: Three SD breakpoint clusters BP1, BP2, BP3 of ~400-500 kb each at ~99% identity; HERC2 (and HERC2P) is the largest duplicon. Imprinted domain (SNRPN, UBE3A) lies between BP2 and BP3.
